description_long: This helmet is a robust, metallic headgear with a weathered, industrial appearance, featuring a full-face design and integrated breathing apparatus. The front displays a prominent, rectangular visor slit and two cylindrical filters or vents below, flanked by ribbed hoses that connect to the sides. The top left side is equipped with a mounted device, possibly a communication or light unit, attached via coiled cables. The sides of the helmet have additional venting slits and mechanical details, while the rear is smooth and rounded with a reinforced lower rim. The surface is predominantly matte gray metal, showing signs of wear and subtle discoloration, giving it a utilitarian, post-apocalyptic aesthetic. The overall construction suggests it is designed for protection in hazardous environments, possibly inspired by power armor or advanced military gear.
description: A rugged, metallic helmet with a full-face visor, integrated breathing apparatus, and attached side device, finished in worn gray metal.
description_view_0: Front view shows the rectangular visor slit, two cylindrical filters, and ribbed hoses attached to the sides.
description_view_1: Left side view highlights the mounted device on top, coiled cables, and side vent slits.
description_view_2: Rear view reveals a smooth, rounded back with a reinforced lower rim and no visible openings.
description_view_3: Right side view displays the mechanical attachment, coiled hose, and additional venting details.
attribute_ventilation_pattern: Multiple rectangular and circular vents: two large cylindrical filters on the front, horizontal slits on both sides, and a small vent on the lower front.
